ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hourly_load" (
  "load_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each load record */,
  "hour_end" TEXT /* End time of the hour for which the load data is recorded */,
  "coast" REAL /* Electricity load in MWh for the COAST region */,
  "east" REAL /* Electricity load in MWh for the EAST region */,
  "far_west" REAL /* Electricity load in MWh for the FAR_WEST region */,
  "north" REAL /* Electricity load in MWh for the NORTH region */,
  "north_c" REAL /* Electricity load in MWh for the NORTH_C region */,
  "southern" REAL /* Electricity load in MWh for the SOUTHERN region */,
  "south_c" REAL /* Electricity load in MWh for the SOUTH_C region */,
  "west" REAL /* Electricity load in MWh for the WEST region */,
  "ercot" REAL /* Total electricity load in MWh for the entire ERCOT grid */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("load_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hourly_load_southern FOREIGN KEY ("southern") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hourly_load_west FOREIGN KEY ("west") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hourly_load_far_west FOREIGN KEY ("far_west") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hourly_load_coast FOREIGN KEY ("coast") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hourly_load_north FOREIGN KEY ("north") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hourly_load_north_c FOREIGN KEY ("north_c") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hourly_load_east FOREIGN KEY ("east") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hourly_load_south_c FOREIGN KEY ("south_c") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_load" (
  "daily_load_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily load record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the load data is aggregated */,
  "coast" REAL /* Total daily electricity load in MWh for the COAST region */,
  "east" REAL /* Total daily electricity load in MWh for the EAST region */,
  "far_west" REAL /* Total daily electricity load in MWh for the FAR_WEST region */,
  "north" REAL /* Total daily electricity load in MWh for the NORTH region */,
  "north_c" REAL /* Total daily electricity load in MWh for the NORTH_C region */,
  "southern" REAL /* Total daily electricity load in MWh for the SOUTHERN region */,
  "south_c" REAL /* Total daily electricity load in MWh for the SOUTH_C region */,
  "west" REAL /* Total daily electricity load in MWh for the WEST region */,
  "ercot" REAL /* Total daily electricity load in MWh for the entire ERCOT grid */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("daily_load_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monthly_load" (
  "monthly_load_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monthly load record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the load data is aggregated */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month for which the load data is aggregated */,
  "coast" REAL /* Total monthly electricity load in MWh for the COAST region */,
  "east" REAL /* Total monthly electricity load in MWh for the EAST region */,
  "far_west" REAL /* Total monthly electricity load in MWh for the FAR_WEST region */,
  "north" REAL /* Total monthly electricity load in MWh for the NORTH region */,
  "north_c" REAL /* Total monthly electricity load in MWh for the NORTH_C region */,
  "southern" REAL /* Total monthly electricity load in MWh for the SOUTHERN region */,
  "south_c" REAL /* Total monthly electricity load in MWh for the SOUTH_C region */,
  "west" REAL /* Total monthly electricity load in MWh for the WEST region */,
  "ercot" REAL /* Total monthly electricity load in MWh for the entire ERCOT grid */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("monthly_load_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_loads" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast record */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date for which the forecast is made */,
  "forecast_hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day for which the forecast is made */,
  "coast" REAL /* Predicted electricity load in MWh for the COAST region */,
  "east" REAL /* Predicted electricity load in MWh for the EAST region */,
  "far_west" REAL /* Predicted electricity load in MWh for the FAR_WEST region */,
  "north" REAL /* Predicted electricity load in MWh for the NORTH region */,
  "north_c" REAL /* Predicted electricity load in MWh for the NORTH_C region */,
  "southern" REAL /* Predicted electricity load in MWh for the SOUTHERN region */,
  "south_c" REAL /* Predicted electricity load in MWh for the SOUTH_C region */,
  "west" REAL /* Predicted electricity load in MWh for the WEST region */,
  "ercot" REAL /* Total predicted electricity load in MWh for the entire ERCOT grid */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was triggered */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the alert is relevant */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., Overload, Underload) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Detailed message of the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, analyst, executive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the weather data is recorded */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day for which the weather data is recorded */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in millimeters */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "load_forecast_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each load forecasting model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the load forecasting model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the load forecasting model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "load_forecast_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each load forecasting result */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding forecast record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the load forecasting model used */,
  "forecasted_load" REAL /* Forecasted load in MWh */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_load_forecast_results_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecast_loads ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_load_forecast_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES load_forecast_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "weather_forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather forecast record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the weather forecast is made */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day for which the weather forecast is made */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Predicted temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Predicted relative humidity in percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Predicted wind speed in meters per second */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Predicted precipitation in millimeters */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the economic indicator is recorded */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of the economic indicator (e.g., GDP, inflation rate) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model performance record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the load forecasting model */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the performance metric (e.g., MAE, RMSE) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES load_forecast_models ("model_id")
)
